examples: Suddenly a surprising image or epigram will light up the scene.
After a little while, the English teacher turned off an epigram.
I can resist everything except temptation is a very interesting epigram.
Well, here's an axiom, if not an epigram, of my own: "Hitch" is least good when most plotted.
The basis of the 10Mbps specification, labeled 2.0 by the alliance, comes from a proposal from Epigram, a subsidiary of Broadcom, and Lucent Technologies Microelectronics Group.
